introSection: Fireball is a steel shuttle roller coaster from Vekoma located at Furuvik in Gävle, Gävleborgs, Sweden.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The addition of Fireball was announced in June 2016. It opened on 20 May 2017.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Fireball is a Family Boomerang from Vekoma. The theme was supplied by Jora Vision.

fullText:
Fireball is a steel shuttle roller coaster from Vekoma located at Furuvik in Gävle, Gävleborgs, Sweden.

The addition of Fireball was announced in June 2016. It opened on 20 May 2017.

Fireball is a Family Boomerang from Vekoma. The theme was supplied by Jora Vision.
